work_experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
duties: Develop and maintain backend solutions using C# and .NET.
Gain hands-on experience with software testing, debugging, and code reviews.

work_experience.title: AWS Cloud Support Associate Intern
duties: Completed an intensive cloud computing program covering Cloud Foundations, Networking, Linux, and Governance.
Collaborated with a team to design, build, and present a cloud-based application.

projects.name: E-Commerce Project
projects.description: Developed an e-commerce platform with Vue.js frontend and Node.js/Express.js backend. Implemented JWT authentication and responsive design, utilizing MySQL for data storage. Enhanced skills in full-stack development and RESTful API design.

projects.name: Point-Of-Sale (POS) System
projects.description: Developed a dynamic Point-Of-Sale (POS) system with a user-friendly interface. Key features include product management, transaction processing, and local storage integration for data persistence.

projects.name: BMI Calculator
projects.description: Created a BMI Calculator using JavaScript that allows users to calculate BMI with real-time input validation and categorized results.

projects.name: Temperature Converter
projects.description: Developed a Temperature Converter app using JavaScript to convert temperatures between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin.

projects.name: Calculator
projects.description: Designed a responsive calculator interface using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Focused on building an intuitive and visually appealing layout.

projects.name: Hex-to-RGB Converter
projects.description: Developed a Hex-RGB Converter using JavaScript, allowing users to convert color codes seamlessly between HEX and RGB formats.

projects.name: RGB-to-Hex Converter
projects.description: Built a RGB-to-Hex Converter app using JavaScript for converting RGB color codes into hexadecimal values.

projects.name: To-Do List
projects.description: Developed a To-Do List application using JavaScript. Includes task creation, deletion, and completion tracking with clean user interface.
